name: static
description: Chrome MV3 extension that blocks extension-enumeration probes and known fingerprinting telemetry.

scripts.check: npm run lint:strict && npm run test:ci
scripts.test: npm run test:static && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:static && npm run test:e2e:xvfb
scripts.test:e2e: playwright test tests/extension-behavior.spec.js tests/edge-privacy.spec.js tests/noise-canary.spec.js tests/adversarial-consistency.spec.js
